title: Phase 2 Trial of Novel Insulin Sensitizer in T2DM
patient: 62-year-old male with type 2 diabetes diagnosed 9 years ago. HbA1c 8.7%, on metformin 1000mg BID and glipizide 10mg QD. BMI 31.2. eGFR 72. No cardiovascular disease. No prior insulin therapy.
criteria: Inclusion: Age 40-75, T2DM ≥2 years, HbA1c 7.5-10%, BMI 25-40, eGFR ≥60. Exclusion: Insulin therapy, pregnancy, active liver disease, prior MI within 6 months.

label.reason: Patient meets all inclusion criteria and has no exclusion factors.

title: Immunotherapy for Stage III NSCLC
patient: 55-year-old female, non-smoker, diagnosed with stage III non-small cell lung cancer (adenocarcinoma) 4 months ago. ECOG PS 1. PD-L1 TPS 45%. Prior platinum-based chemotherapy completed 6 weeks ago. No brain metastases. EGFR wild-type.
criteria: Inclusion: Stage III-IV NSCLC, ECOG 0-2, PD-L1 TPS ≥1%. Exclusion: Prior immunotherapy, active autoimmune disease, systemic steroids >10mg/day prednisone equivalent, brain metastases requiring treatment.

label.reason: Patient meets NSCLC staging and performance criteria with no immunotherapy history.

title: Anti-CD20 in Relapsing-Remitting MS
patient: 34-year-old female, diagnosed with relapsing-remitting MS 5 years ago. Currently on natalizumab for 2 years with stable disease. JC virus antibody positive (index 3.2). No relapses in past 12 months. EDSS 2.0.
criteria: Inclusion: RRMS per 2017 McDonald criteria, age 18-55, EDSS ≤5.5, ≥1 relapse in past 2 years or new T2 lesion. Exclusion: Prior anti-CD20 therapy, active infection, JC antibody index >2.0.

label.reason: JC antibody index of 3.2 exceeds the exclusion threshold of 2.0.

title: Biologics for Moderate-to-Severe Crohn's Disease
patient: 28-year-old male with Crohn's disease diagnosed at age 19. Harvey-Bradshaw Index 9. Failed infliximab and adalimumab. Currently on azathioprine. CRP 18 mg/L. No prior bowel resection. Non-smoker.
criteria: Inclusion: Crohn's disease ≥1 year, HBI ≥7, failed ≥1 TNF antagonist, CRP ≥5 mg/L or fecal calprotectin ≥250 μg/g. Exclusion: Active TB, short bowel syndrome, ostomy, pregnancy.

label.reason: Patient meets moderate-to-severe Crohn's criteria with biologic failure history.

title: Ketamine Augmentation in TRD
patient: 47-year-old female with major depressive disorder, current episode for 18 months. PHQ-9 score 19. Failed adequate trials of sertraline, bupropion, and venlafaxine at therapeutic doses. No current suicidal ideation. No history of psychosis or bipolar disorder. No substance use disorder in past 5 years.
criteria: Inclusion: MDD per DSM-5, PHQ-9 ≥15, failed ≥2 antidepressants, age 21-65. Exclusion: Bipolar I/II, schizophrenia, active substance use disorder, uncontrolled hypertension, pregnancy.

label.reason: Patient meets TRD criteria with adequate antidepressant trial failures.

title: BACE Inhibitor in Early Alzheimer's
patient: 70-year-old male with mild cognitive impairment, CDR 0.5. Amyloid PET positive. MMSE 24. ApoE4 heterozygous. Stable on donepezil 10mg. No vascular dementia. eGFR 55. Mild hypertension controlled on amlodipine.
criteria: Inclusion: MCI or mild AD, age 50-85, CDR 0.5-1.0, amyloid PET positive, MMSE 20-28. Exclusion: eGFR <45, active liver disease, prior BACE inhibitor, uncontrolled hypertension.

label.reason: Patient meets MCI staging and biomarker criteria with acceptable renal function.

title: ADC Therapy in HER2+ Breast Cancer
patient: 52-year-old female with HER2-positive stage IV breast cancer, bone metastases. Received prior trastuzumab + pertuzumab + docetaxel (1st line) and T-DM1 (2nd line). ECOG PS 2. No brain metastases. Left ventricular ejection fraction 55%.
criteria: Inclusion: HER2+ breast cancer, prior trastuzumab, ECOG 0-2, LVEF ≥50%. Exclusion: Prior trastuzumab deruxtecan, active CNS metastases requiring treatment, LVEF <50%.

label.reason: Patient meets HER2+ criteria with prior trastuzumab and adequate cardiac function.

title: Nephroprotective Agent in Stage 4 CKD
patient: 65-year-old female with CKD stage 4 secondary to diabetic nephropathy. eGFR 22 mL/min. Proteinuria 1.8g/day. On RAAS blockade. Hemoglobin 10.2g/dL, on ESA therapy. No dialysis. Potassium 5.1 mEq/L.
criteria: Inclusion: CKD stage 3b-4 (eGFR 15-44), proteinuria >500mg/day, on stable RAAS blockade. Exclusion: Dialysis, kidney transplant, potassium >5.5 mEq/L, hemoglobin <8g/dL.

label.reason: Patient has stage 4 CKD with proteinuria on RAAS blockade, no exclusion criteria met.

title: JAK Inhibitor in RA with Inadequate MTX Response
patient: 44-year-old female with rheumatoid arthritis, seropositive (RF+, anti-CCP+). DAS28 5.8. On methotrexate 20mg/week for 6 months with inadequate response. No prior biologic or JAK inhibitor. Chest X-ray clear. PPD negative.
criteria: Inclusion: RA per ACR criteria, DAS28 ≥3.2, inadequate response to MTX ≥3 months. Exclusion: Active TB or positive QuantiFERON, prior JAK inhibitor or biologic, LVEF <40%, pregnancy.

label.reason: Patient has active RA with documented MTX inadequate response and no exclusion factors.

title: IL-17A Inhibitor for Plaque Psoriasis
patient: 38-year-old male with moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis. BSA 24%, PASI 18. Failed topical therapy and phototherapy. On methotrexate 15mg/week. Active Crohn's disease flare currently managed with prednisone 20mg/day.
criteria: Inclusion: Plaque psoriasis, PASI ≥12, BSA ≥10%, failed ≥1 conventional therapy. Exclusion: Active inflammatory bowel disease, active TB, systemic steroids >10mg/day prednisone equivalent, prior IL-17 biologic.

label.reason: Active Crohn's disease flare and systemic steroids >10mg/day are both exclusion criteria.
